name: Super_Duty_Cab_Door_Front_Left
version_note: Legacy OS passport retained. Kernel canonical entity is CMP-FORD-SD-DOOR-FL-001 (DT-D021). Prefer kernel/instances/f450_door_fl/.

compatibility.notes: Body-generation family compatibility is probable for 2017–2022 Super Duty doors; configuration match per VIN/body style still required before COMPONENT_VERIFIED.

animation_pivots.notes: Do not invent hinge coordinates. Calibrate after door separation from ASSET-00031 and datum alignment.

outer_panel.notes: Aluminum outer panel is platform-typical for this generation; alloy designation remains Probability until OEM/material evidence edge is NORMALIZED.

glass_run_channel.notes: Shore A 70 is an explicit design baseline Assumption for PBR — not COMPONENT_VERIFIED.

dependent_teams.team_a: Audit SRC-OEM-001/002 for door-related dimensional claims when files exist
dependent_teams.team_c: Separate door from ASSET-00031; configure hinge pivot
dependent_teams.team_d: Load passport dynamically in component tree

meta.notes: Hard Rule 0 passport skeleton. Not FROZEN. Geometry freeze globally blocked.
